highlights.label: Aktuell
highlights.title: Call of Duty: Warzone Season 03 Reloaded Patch Notes
highlights.text: 11. Mai 2026: We’re continuing to strengthen our anti-cheat systems to better protect players and ensure fair matches across all platforms. These changes do not apply until Season 04, at which point you can expect the following:

highlights.label: Geprueft
highlights.title: Automatisch aktualisiert
highlights.text: Offizielle Quellen wurden am 14. Mai 2026 um 09:00 MESZ geprueft.

highlights.label: Weitere Updates
highlights.title: Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 Season 03 Patch Notes
highlights.text: 1. Mai 2026: MULTIPLAYER Weapons Sniper Rifles This adjustment went live on May 30 with Season 03 Reloaded but was missed in the Patch Notes. We’re adding it here to ensure visibility. Sniper Rifle Adjustments Weapon Adjustments Weapon: Strider 300 Adjustments: Strider...

updates.title: Call of Duty: Warzone Season 03 Reloaded Patch Notes
updates.summary: We’re continuing to strengthen our anti-cheat systems to better protect players and ensure fair matches across all platforms. These changes do not apply until Season 04, at which point you can expect the following:

updates.title: Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 Season 03 Patch Notes

updates.title: Call of Duty: Warzone Season 03 Patch Notes
updates.summary: We’re refreshing the Exotic Weapon lineup in Black Ops Royale with 3 new additions to keep gameplay feeling dynamic and distinct. Additional Exotic Weapon updates are planned throughout the chapter.

updates.title: Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 Season 02 Patch Notes
updates.summary: Addressed an issue where the Mystery Box would appear broken following time travel after drawing all weapons.

updates.title: Call of Duty: Warzone Season 02 Reloaded Patch Notes
updates.summary: The Emotes & Sprays selection wheel experience has been improved when using a mouse to select desired Emotes of Sprays.

updates.title: Call of Duty: Warzone Season 02 Patch Notes
updates.summary: Iron Gauntlet [Beta] is a new competitive mode in Call of Duty: #Warzone that introduces a more demanding take on Battle Royale built around decision-making and mechanical skill.

updates.title: Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 Season 01 Patch Notes
updates.summary: Smoothed collision on some spots that lead to unintended sightlines for the following maps. (Added Jan. 15)

updates.title: Call of Duty: Warzone Season 01 Reloaded Patch Notes
updates.summary: After dying with Power Armor the Fusion Core reduction penalty reduced from 80% to 50%.
